calendar.matters:
Mtn To Amend And Correct Judgmnt
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Thomas G. Thomatos, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Sophia Ng.
Plaintiff's Sophia Ng's Motion to correct judgment entered on March 17, 2003.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court Grants motion and Order Judgment for Plaintiff and against defendants as follows:
Damages $86,361.61
Interest $3,520.00
Attorney's fees $2,2084.00
Punitive Damages $100,000.00
Total Judgment of $211,965.61.
Court granted motion and signed Order to correct judgment on October 20, 2003, It is Ordered that the Judgment entered on March 17, 2003, be amended by: 1. Deleting the fallowing: E-Z Auto Sales Leasing, Gary Langstein (aka Gary Langstein); and inserting in its place the following: E-Z Auto Sales Leasing (aka E-Z Auto Sales, Leasing & Rental, Inc.) and Gary Langstein (aka Gary Langshteyn).
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit Judgment within five days, incorporating the amended amount of Judgment and the changes for correction of name granted on October 20, 2003 by Order signed by Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire.
